rationale: The current translation is excellent. It correctly uses 'ארבעת עמודי' (the construct form) which is grammatically superior to the other candidate. It maintains Dan's direct, punchy style and preserves all MDX formatting and metadata. The previous suggestion regarding 'modeling' was already incorporated into the current version ('היו מכוונים בדוגמה האישית...'), making it highly natural for a Hebrew-speaking professional audience.

suggestionLog.match: היה מכוון במודלינג של מה שאתה רוצה לראות.
suggestionLog.replacement: היו מכוונים בדוגמה האישית שאתם נותנים למה שאתם רוצים לראות.
suggestionLog.reason: 'Modeling' is transliterated/hebraized awkwardly here; 'personal example' or 'modeling behavior' is more natural in Hebrew.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
